arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale given Man United £25m transfer green light amid Arsenal reunion verdict
arts.sum: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale has been told he would be a better option at Manchester United than Andre Onana. And former Rangers boss Ally MCcoist and ex-Sky Sports presenter Jeff Stelling have had their say on reports that Ramsdale could be a potential summer replacement for United's under-fire goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make Liam Delap decision as 'favourites' revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly the only Premier League club not pursuing a deal for Ipswich Town forward Liam Delap this summer. Furthermore, Arsenal are reportedly understood to be the only Premier League club not chasing Delap this summer.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney stirs huge debate with controversial Arsenal and Real Madrid combined XI
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-final second leg on Wednesday with a 3-0 aggregate lead and Wayne Rooney has angered a handful of fans with his picks for a combined XI

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham reveals the ‘most used’ word in Real Madrid dressing room before Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham has on Tuesday provided an insight into developments in the club’s dressing room over recent days. This, of course, comes ahead of something of a…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid learn length of Kylian Mbappe suspension after Alaves red card
arts.sum: The RFEF confirm the length of Kylian Mbappe's suspension after his red card against Alaves.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirmed key Arsenal star did not travel for Real Madrid clash amid double boost
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta did confirm that Thomas Partey and Ben White have both travelled with the team for the game. Partey was spotted in training ahead of the team’s flight to Madrid, which provided a boost to supporters who had been worried the Ghanaian may miss the clash, having come off early against Brentford.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta offers triple injury update with star ruled OUT of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Arsenal will travel to the Bernabeu on Wednesday night with a three-goal lead to protect as they look to book themselves a place in the semi-finals of the Champions League

arts.ttl: Andoni Iraola set for face-to-face contract talks with Bournemouth hierachy amid interest from Tottenham and Real Madrid
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: This season he has defied the odds by taking Bournemouth's relatively small squad to the cusp of Europe with some eye-catching performances along the way.

arts.ttl: UEFA consider Champions League rule change after Arsenal given Real Madrid boost
arts.sum: However, this does not extend to the quarter-finals or semi-finals, and there has been some backlash over Arsenal being scheduled to play the second leg of their match against Real Madrid at the Bernabeu. Despite these concerns, Arsenal are in a commanding position ahead of the second leg of their match with Madrid.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti channels Carlos Alcaraz to inspire Real Madrid comeback against Arsenal
arts.sum: Los Blancos boss also insists failure to overturn sizable deficit in the Champions League quarter-finals won’t impact his position at the Bernabeu
